name: velero
explanation: Velero's check is a thin `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` that scrapes a single Prometheus endpoint. The spec uses the standard `instances/openmetrics` template with `openmetrics_endpoint` as the only required field. The Velero server (and `node-agent` daemonset) expose Prometheus metrics on port 8085 at `/metrics` by default, as confirmed by the integration's own validators (`http://localhost:8085/metrics`) and Velero's upstream Helm chart defaults. A generic OpenMetrics port-scan on `:8085/metrics` over `%%host%%` is sufficient to discover and configure both the Velero deployment and the node-agent daemonset.
notes: Two pod sets (velero deployment and node-agent daemonset) both expose `:8085/metrics`; auto-config should annotate both. Metrics must be enabled in the deployment (default is on).
